description: Discover the path to a healthier lifestyle with our comprehensive survey results, tailored specifically to your customer profile. This email template is designed to provide valuable insights into your wellness journey, offering personalized recommendations and guidelines to enhance your beauty and personal care regime. It effortlessly bridges the gap between e-commerce and health consciousness, making it a breeze to incorporate wellness products into your daily routine. Be it skincare, nutrition, or fitness, our survey results aim to enrich your understanding of your health needs, paving the way for a more vibrant, healthier you. Explore the world of e-commerce with a wellness twist, and let us guide you towards a healthier, happier life.
short_description: Uncover your path to wellness with our personalized survey results. This email template bridges e-commerce and health, offering tailored beauty and personal care recommendations. Explore wellness-focused e-commerce and enhance your healthy lifestyle today.

designer.description: I have a degree in graphic design and I am dedicated to the world of communication providing graphic solutions to companies to get the best out of them. I consider myself a detail-oriented, demanding and multidisciplinary person, passionate about the world of communication. I believe in design as a powerful tool to communicate values, ideas and emotions, this is what I try to transfer in any project to always get the best result.

html_data:
WWW.EXAMPLE.COM

We sent you a survey, here are the results

Your opinion helps us to improve, thank you for your participation.

Participate in other surveys
 

How fast was our shipment?

Not good

15%

Neutral

20%

Good

65%

65% of customers think our delivery was fast

 

Are you satisfied with our products?

No

5%

More or less

15%

Yes

80%

80% of our customers are satisfied with our products.

 

Are you satisfied with the attention you received?

Not good

20%

Neutral

30%

Good

50%

50% of our customers are satisfied with the service we provide.

 
 
 

Do you consider it important that our products contain aloe vera?

80%

80% of our customers think it is important that our products contain ALOE VERA.

 
 
 

What is the product most used by our customers?

The product most used by our customers is our moisturizing cream with aloe vera that provides firmness and liveliness to the face.
